chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No. 102 of 2024 (Aziz-ur-Rehman Adeel versus The State) Date Order with signature of Judges 1. For orders on office objection (Flag A) 2. For hearing of bail application 08.05.2024 Mr. Ahmad Khan Bugti, advocates for the applicant Mr. Shoukat Ali Bohio, advocate for the complainant Mr. Mumtaz Ali Shah, Asstt. PG ----------------------------------- The facts, in brief, necessary for the disposal of the instant bail application are that the applicant on his involvement in the murder case sought protective bail from this court and then sought pre-arrest bail by filing such application before learned trial Court; he was admitted to interim pre-arrest bail subject to furnishing a requisite surety, which he failed to furnish rather chosen to remain absent; consequently, his such application was dismissed by learned IInd- Additional Sessions Judge Naushahro Feroze, apparently in default and for non-prosecution. Later on the applicant by seeking permission from the Hon’ble Chief Justice Sindh under Rule 7 of the Sindh High Court Benches Rules, 1987, sought pre- arrest bail from this Court by way of the instant Crl. Bail Application. Heard arguments and perused the record. The bail application of the applicant was not disposed of by the learned trial Court on merits, therefore, he could hardly approach this Court directly for the purpose; consequently, the instant bail application is disposed of with the direction to the applicant to repeat the application seeking pre-arrest bail by making such application before Sessions Court/trial Court as the case may be as per law for its disposal on merits.

Heard arguments and perused the record. The bail application of the applicant was not disposed of by the learned trial Court on merits, therefore, he could hardly approach this Court directly for the purpose; consequently, the instant bail application is disposed of with the direction to the applicant to repeat the application seeking pre-arrest bail by making such application before Sessions Court/trial Court as the case may be as per law for its disposal on merits. Instant bail application is disposed of accordingly. J U D G E
